title: 2026-06-01 Shino Vienna Celadon Salon
summary: Shino character-day reinterpretation of the Vienna celadon indoor salon daily set, preserving the daily outfits while moving through Looshaus lobby, Palais Ferstel, Musikverein foyer, and a Josefstadt apartment record night.
summaryJa: 紫乃のウィーン日常アルバム。色の軸はセラドン・ピスタチオ。構成は仕事場、受付、劇場、夜の部屋。

images.alt: Shino, adult 24, in the Looshaus lobby in Vienna on 2026-06-01, checking a slim portfolio while wearing a celadon long sleeveless waistcoat, ivory rib knit top, charcoal cropped tapered trousers, pale sheer socks, black slingback pumps, and a small black bag with fish charm
images.title: 01 Office Looshaus celadon waistcoat

images.alt: Shino, adult 24, at a quiet reception in Palais Ferstel in Vienna on 2026-06-01, holding a porcelain cup and bead pouch while wearing a celadon wrap blouse, an ivory long pleated skirt, cream slingback pumps, and a tiny jellyfish charm
images.title: 02 Formal Palais Ferstel celadon wrap

images.alt: Shino, adult 24, in the Musikverein foyer in Vienna before an evening concert on 2026-06-01, adjusting a translucent ivory cropped jacket and holding a program while wearing a smoky pistachio square-neck satin column dress, bare legs, black low-heel Mary Jane pumps, and a fish pendant
images.title: 03 Theater Musikverein pistachio satin

images.alt: Shino, adult 24, in a Josefstadt Altbau apartment salon at night on 2026-06-01, sitting on parquet floor and choosing a record beside a fish notebook while wearing a pale pistachio cropped cardigan, ivory tank, bronze satin wrap shorts over black leggings, cream socks, ivory ballet flats, and a soft ribbon in her long hair
images.title: 04 Home Josefstadt record pistachio bronze
